questions.questionText: 「<u>振り込め</u>詐欺」防止運動が実施された。
questions.explanation: 振り込め (ふりこめ) means bank transfer, here referring to bank transfer scams (振り込め詐欺).

questions.questionText: 申込用紙は1階のカウンターに＿＿＿＿ありますので、ご利用ください。
questions.explanation: 備え付ける means to provide or equip. The sentence means application forms are provided at the 1st-floor counter.

questions.questionText: 父親は息子を帰国＿＿＿＿べく、来日した。
questions.explanation: The causative form させる is needed here: 'in order to make his son return to his home country'. べく connects to the dictionary form of the verb.
